transcript.text:
Hello everyone~
I prepared 100 deep-fried cheeseballs today
I've also done this mukbang before
And that video is also gone forever
So I'm here to do it again
I'm not too sure if I can do it I struggled a little if I remember correctly
I have 20 seasoned and 80 regular
Bon appetit
I struggle to do this challenge because it can get really greasy
It's been a while
How did I manage to do it last time? This is a lot of cheeseballs
If I split it in half I feel like there's more cheese than last time
Yes, it feels like more cheese
This is from BHC
As for the taste,
It's just like cheese inside a glutinous rice dough

I turned on the stream as soon as I got home, but it got cold already
Prinkle cheeseball (seasoned)
This tastes better I should've ordered more of these
This is the Prinkle sauce
Yummy!
These are tasty
Can I just order the seasoning powder so I can dip it?
It's not greasy right now, but it will be later on
I better save the seasoned ones for last
Where is Jingu today?
Jingu~
Should I trick him?
Jingu~
Want a treat?
Then he'll come
You better work for it

He's here!
I remember seeing this one
Will it fit?
It's 1,000 Won each (~$0.90 USD) So it was around $90 total
Prinkle dip
The inside?
[Chat: Have you ever ordered more sides than the main meal?] Of course, just like today
No one's keeping track of how many I'm at, right?
It's not mozzarella cheese
[Chat: I was counting, but not anymore]
No one knows. I don't know either How many am I at?
I shouldn't have prepared 100 of these if no one was going to count
Trick everyone And have 99 instead
It's not greasy yet How many am I at?
I'd say about 20? 30?
[Counting..]

Wait no
[Counting again..]
I don't know
I want some Ramyun noodles I'm still doing okay
But I always just crave it
[Chat: 100 cheeseballs or 20 Ramyun noodles?] 20 Ramyun noodles are easier to eat
These are the seasoned
What? What's up?
Yawning?
Just look at him So cute
He's purring
[Chat: Give me a bite]
Not that one, I'm saving it
Did he come down already?
My head hurts
[Chat: Your temporal artery hurts if you don't like something a lot] Is that true?

Why is that?
Migraine..
How many do I have left?
[Counting..]
47 left
I ate more than half
I wonder how much they weigh
Let's use the human scale
No idea
If it's 30g, how heavy is 100?
3kg?
That's not a lot
I'm craving some refreshing ice cream
This still does the job
I personally like the seasoned ones more
Both my head and my jaw hurts

I'm eating it because it tastes good
Do I only have 37 left?
The pain is going in a line right now
Up to here
Uh oh
I feel like I'm building muscles
It's delicious
It won't taste as good if I heat it up in the microwave or the air fryer
My head hurts way too much
Should I take a break?
I'll bring some snacks
I have a migraine
Maybe I was using my jaw too much, that's why
So now I'll eat some noodles
[Chat: What kind of logic is that?] Tzuyang Logics
Hot

The migraine is gone See? Ramyun noodles cure everything
Let's continue
I'm scared that the migraine will come back
It's back
Should I get some sugar?
What? Again?
Yummy
Yes my jaw and my head hurts
Yes there are foods I was sick of Braised kimchi, ostrich egg
Fried turkey leg
They're not gross As for the turkey leg,
I finished the non-fried legs But not the fried legs
I have a huge headache..
